title: clinopodium hispidulum
intro: Clinopodium hispidulum, also known as hispid calamint or prickly calamint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Clinopodium hispidulum has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
